session.user:
Run pytest for these specific test files and report results:
1. `pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_impl_reset.py -x -v` 2. `pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/test_implement.py -x -v`
Report the full output including any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run both pytest commands for you and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest for test_impl_reset.py with verbose output

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest for test_implement.py with verbose output
